# Custom Syntax

:::warning
**Caution:** This action cannot be undone.
:::

:::note
Remember to save your work regularly.
:::

:::danger
**Critical:** Data loss may occur.
:::

:::info
For more details, see the [documentation](https://example.com).
:::

Nested formatting inside a block:

:::tip
1. First step
2. Second step with `code`
3. Third step with **bold** and *italic*
:::

Image with custom class:

![Hero image](hero.jpg).class="img-fluid rounded shadow"

![Thumbnail](thumb.png).class="thumbnail"
